name: Baked Cranberry Squash
recipeIngredient: 2 large Acorn squash, split lengthwise and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Place squash cut side up on a foil-lined baking sheet.
3. In a large bowl, combine pear, cranberries, orange juice concentrate, honey or syrup, cinnamon, and allspice.
4. Spoon the mixture into the squash cavities.
5. Use any extra liquid to brush the cut edges of the squash.
6. Bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the squash is soft.
7. Serve hot. Serves 4. Per Serving: 126 calories; 3 g. protein; .5 g. fat; 4 mg carbohydrate; 0 cholesterol; 4 mg. sodium.
